MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Barrick Arnold of the Law Offices of Max G. Arnold, LLC, moving party.

Hearing held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Max G. Arnold, Inc's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFF JAVIER MEDINA is off calenddar. Counsel may re-file and serve; to be set on a Friday Law and Motion calendar.
